summary: Verified memo upload bug fix: signed_memo_url and signed_memo_filename now correctly returned in Jobs API responses. All 4 requested test scenarios pass.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Job #16 and #17 with memos
context_for_next_testing_agent: Memo upload fix verified. signed_memo_url and signed_memo_filename now returned in both GET /api/jobs and GET /api/jobs/{job_id} responses. Jobs #16 and #17 have test memos uploaded. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_memo_upload.py contains regression tests.

test_flows_completed.feature: Memo upload on Jobs page - 'Uploaded' badge
test_flows_completed.details: Job #17 shows green 'Uploaded' badge in job detail modal. Badge is visible next to 'Signed Memo' section label.

test_flows_completed.feature: Memo upload on Jobs page - View Document
test_flows_completed.details: View Document link is visible and contains base64 PDF data. Opens in new tab (target='_blank').

test_flows_completed.feature: Memo upload on Jobs page - Replace Memo
test_flows_completed.details: Replace Memo button visible with data-testid='upload-memo-button'. Shows 'Replace Memo' text when memo already exists.

test_flows_completed.feature: Memo upload in nested shipment modal - 'Uploaded' badge
test_flows_completed.details: Opening Shipment #3 > Job #17 shows 'Uploaded' badge, 'View' button, and 'Replace Memo' button in nested job modal.

test_flows_completed.feature: Memo upload in nested shipment modal - View button
test_flows_completed.details: View button visible in nested job modal within shipment context.

test_flows_completed.feature: Backend API - GET /api/jobs returns memo fields
test_flows_completed.details: Response includes signed_memo_url and signed_memo_filename for all jobs. Job #17 has 'fixed_test_memo.pdf', Job #16 has 'new_test_memo.pdf'.

test_flows_completed.feature: Backend API - GET /api/jobs/{id} returns memo fields
test_flows_completed.details: Single job endpoint also returns signed_memo_url and signed_memo_filename correctly.
Memo upload API returns 200 and persists data correctly.

bugs_verified_fixed.issue: Memo upload succeeded but data wasn't displayed in UI
bugs_verified_fixed.root_cause: signed_memo_url and signed_memo_filename were not included in JobResponse model and were not being returned by get_jobs() and get_job() API functions
bugs_verified_fixed.fix: Main agent added signed_memo_url and signed_memo_filename to JobResponse Pydantic model and updated both get_jobs() and get_job() functions to include job.get('signed_memo_url') and job.get('signed_memo_filename') in response

screenshots_taken: 07_job17_modal.png - Job #17 detail showing memo section with Uploaded badge
10_nested_job_modal.png - Nested Job #17 modal within shipment with memo section
